ideation: This sequence simulates the stirring motion used while cooking.  The robot will mimic the act of stirring a pot on a stove. The right arm will perform the primary stirring action, while the left arm will rest lightly on the counter for stability.  This will be a 4-frame sequence. Frame 1: Both arms are relaxed at the side. Frame 2: The right arm is positioned as if holding a spoon/spatula, slightly bent at the 'elbow' (simulated by the joint angles). Left arm rests lightly on a counter. Frame 3: The right arm performs a downward stirring motion. Left arm remains stable. Frame 4: The right arm returns to the starting position of frame 2, completing one stirring cycle.

frames.beat: right arm poised to stir, left hand rests
stirring the pot with a downward motion
right arm completes the stir, ready for another
